message:
fix(choreography): loop codegen break, duplicate participant detection

codegen.rs:
- Add explicit break statement at the end of generated loop bodies. Without it,
  loops that don't hit a RecVar (continue) would fall through to an implicit
  infinite loop. The break ensures the generated code terminates correctly when
  the loop body completes without recursion
- Update test assertion to verify break presence in generated code

mod.rs:
- Track duplicate participant names during builder construction in a BTreeSet
  (deterministic iteration order). Previously, calling .participant("alice", _)
  twice would silently overwrite the first declaration via BTreeMap::insert
- Emit ValidationError::DuplicateParticipant for each duplicate name during
  validate(), surfacing the error deterministically in lexical order instead of
  silently losing participant metadata
- Second declaration is now a no-op (early return) preserving the first
  participant's role configuration
- Add test verifying duplicate detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
